_schema: experiment_log.jsonl: one JSON object per line, one per driver iteration/run. Fields: timestamp (UTC ISO8601), task_id, type, command (the verification command run), result_path (saved claude run JSON / artifact path), passed (bool), num_turns (int|null), cost_usd (float|null), note (str). This first line is the schema marker and is ignored by readers (it has _schema).
